commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed from this read-only review; this active maintainer PR has no discrete blocking finding for automation to fix.; Cleared: The diff is limited to Swift iOS app/widget lifecycle and UI code and does not change credentials, package resolution, CI, scripts, permissions, or downloaded code. commands.review_summary:
This PR updates the iOS Live Activity manager, widget UI, and gateway model wiring to end stale or no-longer-useful activities, prune old activities during hydration, show attention states, and use compact status icons.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, not from a live device run in this review. Current main can start or update a Connecting Live Activity before node gateway connection and does not end it when the node connection reaches a healthy state.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed from this read-only review; this active maintainer PR has no discrete blocking finding for automation to fix.
